'''Loratus Manufacturing''' was a manufacturer of mobile weapons systems and related droids during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The company was known to be sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and many of its products found their way into the Alliance's military.

{{Company-stub}}
